heading: Filing of plan
label: 1221 Filing of plan
text: The debtor shall file a plan not later than 90 days after the order for relief under this chapter, except that the court may extend such period if the need for an extension is attributable to circumstances for which the debtor should not justly be held accountable.
notes: CodificationFor repeal of section effective , and subsequent reenactment of section, see note set out preceding .Oct. 1, 1998section 1201 of this title

Amendments1993— substituted “the need for an extension is attributable to circumstances for which the debtor should not justly be held accountable” for “an extension is substantially justified”.Pub. L. 103–65

Effective Date of 1993 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub.
